description: The 'Discovery' page content loads, displaying 'Step 1: What is the name of your project?'
frame_description: The main content area updates from a loading or empty state to show the first step of the Discovery phase.

description: User clicks on the 'Quota' sidebar item to navigate to the participant quota settings
frame_description: The sidebar shows the 'Quota' item highlighted, indicating the user has selected this section of the study setup.
